startup_analysis.name: Framework bindApplication bootstrap
startup_analysis.recommendation: Use Jetpack App Startup, defer non-essential SDK initialization, audit ContentProviders.

startup_analysis.name: App-side class, code and native first-use (JIT/Dex)
startup_analysis.recommendation: Missing Baseline Profile or Cloud Profile. App is forced to JIT compile during startup.

startup_analysis.name: Activity instantiation and lifecycle
startup_analysis.recommendation: Heavy onCreate() or onStart() in main Activity. Consider lazily inflating views/fragments.

startup_analysis.name: Activity instantiation and lifecycle (Resume)
startup_analysis.recommendation: onResume() in main Activity takes too long.

startup_analysis.name: Synchronization and startup barriers (ART Lock)
startup_analysis.recommendation: Avoid blocking the main thread waiting for Mutex/Lock from background threads. Often caused by synchronized singletons.

startup_analysis.name: Synchronization and startup barriers (Mutex)
startup_analysis.recommendation: Avoid blocking the main thread waiting for Mutex/Lock from background threads.

startup_analysis.name: Cross-service work and side effects (Binder)
startup_analysis.recommendation: Minimize synchronous IPC calls on the Main Thread to System Server.

startup_analysis.name: Lifecycle transaction construction/delivery
startup_analysis.recommendation: Lifecycle communication from system_server takes too long to process.

startup_analysis.name: Native library and linker initialization (dlopen)
startup_analysis.recommendation: Loading C++ libraries (.so) is taking too long. Consider loading them in a background thread if not immediately needed.

startup_analysis.name: Layout inflation, View construction and styling
startup_analysis.recommendation: XML layout inflation is too slow. Consider flattening the view hierarchy or using AsyncLayoutInflater/Compose.

startup_analysis.name: Resource table and asset-content loading
startup_analysis.recommendation: Delay caused by Resources/Assets access. Avoid synchronous large file reads.

startup_analysis.name: Measure and layout traversal
startup_analysis.recommendation: First frame rendering (measure/layout/draw) is too heavy. Optimize UI hierarchy.

startup_analysis.name: CPU capacity and scheduler interference
startup_analysis.recommendation: Main Thread is runnable but preempted by OS. Check background process count or cpuset priority.

startup_analysis.name: Storage and filesystem contention
startup_analysis.recommendation: Move large file/DB reads to a background thread. Avoid synchronous SharedPreferences (I/O block).

startup_analysis.name: Direct GC blocking
startup_analysis.recommendation: Reduce object allocations (memory churn) to prevent blocking GC.

startup_analysis.name: Thermal, power, DVFS and core availability
startup_analysis.recommendation: Kernel is throttling CPU frequency due to device heating. Use ADPF PerformanceHintManager.
